regional_cost_note: Surveyors in Whanganui typically charge $1,300–$3,800 for a boundary survey, $4,500–$28,000+ for subdivision, and $900–$2,800 for a building setout. Whanganui rates are typically 10–15% below the national average. Title searches and LIM reports are recommended before any boundary-related work — your surveyor can advise.
